channel.title: awesome list on Stuff
channel.description: Recent content in awesome list on Stuff

item.title: iOS 101: Awesome iOS Security Testing Tools
item.description: A curated list of resources for security testing of iOS apps. (Keep updating) Checkra1n: a semi-tethered jailbreak tool. This means that you need to connect the device to a computer every time you want to jailbreak/rejailbreak. Checkra1n also uses an exploit that is hardware based (Apple can’t patch this).
